column1: She asked him, "Why did you make me go out tonight?"

column2: She asked him why he had made her go out that night.

column1: I said to Jim, "Where were you last month?"

column2: I asked Jim where he had been the previous month.

column1: She says to me, "Do you think it is right?"

column2: She asks me if I think it is right.

column1: The writer said to the editor, "Will the book have been published by spring?"

column2: The writer asked the editor if the book would have been published by spring.

column1: He says, "What are you doing there, Liz?"

column2: He asks Liz what she is doing there.

column1: She asked me, "Are these articles still being printed?"

column2: She asked me if those articles were still being printed.

column1: He said to her, "Why don't you spend a few days with Alice?"

column2: He asked her why she did not spend a few days with Alice.
Sheila asked Kate if they had got married.

column1: Lucy asked Jo, "Why wasn't the doctor sent for?"

column2: Lucy asked Jo why the doctor hadn't been sent for.

column1: He said to Bert, "When was all this decided?"

column2: He asked Bert when all that had been decided.
